headline: Independent Chair Proposal Tests Governance And Valuation Views At UnitedHealth Group
summary: A shareholder proposal asks that any future Board Chair at UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) be an independent director. The proposal will be put to a vote at the company’s upcoming annual meeting. UnitedHealth Group’s board is opposing the measure and is encouraging shareholders to vote against it. The filing highlights investor interest in board independence and oversight at large health insurers. UnitedHealth Group, traded as NYSE:UNH, is one of the largest health insurers globally, with...
